banner.Presentation: I am currently studying computer science at Laval University. I have always been interested in technological fields which earned me a college diploma in electrical engineering / telecommunications and networks. I hope to continue my journey in the field with several interesting projects.

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.text: During my career I have developed several skills in different fields that can be used when designing different projects. Here are some of these skills that I was able to develop in the last couple of years.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.text: Here are some projects that I had the chance to develop in my career, hoping to add more in the future.
